assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud commands to verify current versions, kubectl commands to check cluster health and node status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes the exact gcloud get-server-config command with grep filter for REGULAR channel to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 provides kubectl get --raw /metrics command to check for deprecated API usage before proceeding with upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 3.1 includes the exact gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master flag and --cluster-version 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3.3 provides gcloud describe command to verify control plane is at 1.33.x and kubectl commands to check system pods with expected outcomes

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 4.1 and 4.4 provide exact gcloud node-pools upgrade commands for both pools, upgrading directly from 1.32 to 1.33 (single-level upgrade, not skip-level but still valid)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 4.2 and 4.5 include watch commands for node status, operations list commands to monitor upgrade progress, and commands to check for stuck pods

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane first, then node pools - direct single-step upgrade rather than skip-level but this is appropriate for the version gap

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive validation with gcloud describe to check versions, kubectl commands to verify node status, pod health, and kube-system pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes dedicated rollback procedure section with commands for creating new node pools at 1.32, cordoning nodes, and migration steps, plus troubleshooting section
